question: Tell me about a time you disagreed with your manager. What did you do?
Design a package tracking system that handles millions of shipments per day.
Given a stream of numbers, return the median at any point in O(log n) per query.
Describe a project where you had to simplify a complex technical decision for non-engineers.
Design the news feed ranking system for 2 billion daily active users.
Tell me about a time you shipped something quickly and had to iterate based on metrics.
Give an example of receiving difficult feedback and how you acted on it.
How do you handle freedom and responsibility when there is no strict process?
